injuries.comment: The Flyers said on Tuesday (Sept. 16) that Ristolainen is still on injured reserve but is working his way back to full strength and will aim to join the team sometime during the first 1-2 months of the 2025-26 season, per Charlie O'Connor of PHLY Sports.
The Philadelphia Flyers placed D Ryan Ellis on long-term injured reserve on Monday (Oct. 7).
The Flyers said on Tuesday (Sept. 16) that Foerster could be cleared for contact in about a week, per Charlie O'Connor of PHLY Sports.
The Flyers said on Thursday (Sept. 18) that Bonk is day-to-day with an upper body injury.
The Flyers reported on Friday (Sept. 19) that Dorwart is considered day-to-day due to an upper-body injury.
